creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Thank you for the self-contained test case.

Unfortunately I am not able to reproduce this on any of:

FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT up to date as of Nov 21 2014 (i5-2540M laptop bare metal)
FreeBSD 10.1-RC2 (i7-3770 desktop bare metal)
FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE (VM image from http://nongnu.org/pretest/ under bhyve)

I see from the bug-gnulib list that this has been observed running the FreeBSD image under Linux KVM. Is that common to all reproduction cases?
